phases.title: Daemon Bootstrap

tasks.title: Implement src/server/index.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Fastify bootstrap, route registration, `/health` endpoint, graceful shutdown handler

tasks.title: Implement src/server/pid.ts
tasks.description: NEW: PID file read/write/check/remove at `.gwrk/server.pid`

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/server.ts
tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk server start` and `gwrk server stop` subcommands

tasks.title: Implement src/cli.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Register `server` command group

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/config.ts

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `test -f src/server/index.ts && test -f src/server/pid.ts && test -f src/commands/server.ts` exits 0

phases.title: System Monitor & Status

tasks.title: Implement src/server/monitor.ts

tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk status` command — queries daemon `/api/status` or returns `{server:{status:"stopped"}}`

tasks.description: MODIFY: Register `status` command

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/config.ts
